symbol.description: asset ticker symbol (e.g., aapl, tsla, btcusd)

conviction score.description: accumulated weighted result from multiple matrix factors

confidence.description: percentage confidence level (1-100% after risk review)

success prob.description: probabilistic win rate based on historical backtests

sl range.description: hard exit level for risk mitigation

short_ratio.description: What is the current short float ratio

short_float.description: What is the current short float(%)

institutional_holding.description: What is the stock Institutional holding percentage

squeeze_risk.description: short squeeze vulnerability on a 1-10 scale

approximate_gain_pct.description: If the scenario will occur what will be the expected gain in percentage

conviction_detect.description: How to Detect “High Conviction”: Add Signs for high Conviction show the trade is valid.

collapse_trigger.description: (Invalidation event) - How to detect “Collapse Conviction”: Add Signs for “Collapse Conviction” - show the trade is NOT valid

required_volume.description: The required volume for this trade to be valid

poc node.description: point of control (high volume price node from volume profile)

absorption.description: large institutional hidden orders present (icebergs detected? y/n)

sector sympathy.description: relative industry strength assessment (is it a leader or laggard?)

spx/qqq_corr.description: beta context and market correlation coefficient

ai_suggestion.description: (mark with “v” if ceo-added beyond specialist list)

ai_model_name.description: what is your AI model name?
